definitions.subtitle: ={{ $parameter["operation"] + ": " + $parameter["resource"] }}
definitions.description: Interact with Moonshot Kimi AI models

options.name: Analyze Image
options.description: Analyze an image and answer questions about it

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.hint: The name of the input field containing the binary file data to be processed
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the image(s), separate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

options.description: Fewer tokens will result in shorter, less detailed image description
options.name: maxTokens
Message a Model
options.description: Send a message and get a response from a Moonshot Kimi model

values.name: content
values.description: The content of the message to be sent
values.placeholder: e.g. Hello, how can you help me?

values.name: role
values.description: Role in shaping the model's response, it tells the model how it should behave and interact with the user

options.name: User
options.description: Send a message as a user and get a response from the model

options.name: Assistant
options.description: Tell the model to adopt a specific tone or personality

properties.name: addAttachments
properties.description: Whether to add image attachments to the message

properties.name: binaryPropertyName
properties.description: Name of the binary field(s) which contains the image(s) to attach, separate multiple field names with commas

properties.name: simplify
properties.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

options.name: frequencyPenalty
options.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim

options.name: includeMergedResponse
options.description: Whether to include a single output string merging all text parts of the response

options.name: maxTokens
options.description: The maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion

options.name: maxToolsIterations
options.description: The maximum number of tool iteration cycles the LLM will run before stopping. A single iteration can contain multiple tool calls. Set to 0 for no limit.

options.name: temperature
options.description: Controls the randomness of the output. Lowering results in less random completions. As the temperature approaches zero, the model will become deterministic and repetitive.

options.name: topP
options.description: The maximum cumulative probability of tokens to consider when sampling

options.name: presencePenalty
options.description: Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics

options.name: JSON
options.description: Enables JSON mode, which should guarantee the message the model generates is valid JSON

options.name: system
options.placeholder: e.g. You are a helpful assistant

options.name: thinkingMode
options.description: Whether to enable thinking mode for deep reasoning. The model will include reasoning steps in the response. Cannot be used together with Web Search.

options.name: webSearch
options.description: Whether to enable built-in web search. The model will search the web for relevant information. Cannot be used together with Thinking Mode.

definitions.name: @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.moonshot
